g.class: el ma

rect.title: Result of bag handling from handler to airline

g.class: se co
el ma hd

rect.title: Active segment of bag journey including relevant details

g.class: se hd co
el ma hd hd1

rect.title: A piece of luggage associated with a passenger, packed for traveling, and necessary or appropriate in connection with a journey.

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A small piece of paper, fabric, plastic or similar material attached to an bag and giving information about it.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Baggage identifier used for internal usage only (typically used as Julian date on 3 numeric)

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Baggage tag issuer codes, combined with the tag serial number, are used to identify each piece of checked luggage through all baggage handling processes. Refer to Resolution 769 Bag Tag Issuer Codes

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: An organization which acts on behalf of another.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Code of the agency organization.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A Role of an individual person to be a staff of an agency.

rect.title: Code of the agency organization.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Identifier of an agent as assigned by his/her agency.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A device for printing text or pictures or barcodes, especially one linked to a computer.

el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Identifier of the device.

rect.title: A Role of an individual person to be a staff of an agency.

rect.title: Identifier of an agent as assigned by his/her agency.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: With Bag Tag Serial Number Code a Bag Tag Issuer may identify bags of her interest. See Resolution 740 Interline Bag Tag

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Unique Transponder identifier, known as TID for Transponder identification

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: With Bag Tag Usage Code a Bag Tag Issuer may differentiate use of the tag. See Resolution 740 Section 3 Use of Tags

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A set of measurable extents of a particular bag, such as length, or height or width.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A measurement or extent of something from end to end

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The length unit code of measure.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A measurement or extent of something from end to end

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The length unit code of measure.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A measurement or extent of something from end to end

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The length unit code of measure.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A single human being as distinct from a group, class, or family.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A Bag is owned by an individual who may take role of either passenger or crew member for a given bag segment. In this case, the presence/absence of CREW exception code will tell for each Bag Segment which of the two applies.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A Role of an individual person to be a member of a crew.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: An organization operating transport vehicles for commercial purposes which offers transport services, both scheduled or non-scheduled, to the public for carriage of passengers and their baggage, mail and/or cargo and is certified for such purposes by an authority of the state in which it is established.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code assigned to the carrier. For example: BA is British Airways PLC, 2C is SNCF and is also CMA CGM Air Cargo.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: Indicates that the carrier designator code is a duplicate code shared by multiple carriers. In this case to uniquely identify the carrier the carrier name must be specified in addition to the carrier designator code.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Identifier of a crew member as assigned by the airline.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A person except members of the crew carried or to be carried with the consent of the carrier, on board of any transport vehicle such as aircraft, train, bus, ship. Holds the attributes specific to a one booking, from shopping to fulfillment.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: A booking or reservation.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: Booking reference Identifier, also called Record Locator (6 characters).

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: Code of company having issued the booking reference identifier.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: A number of individual passengers traveling under one commercial name that associates them. E.g. a Tour group or a group for sales allotment from airline to agency.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: Intended number of passengers for this Group.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: Uniquely identifies a Passenger Group.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: The name of the group.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Uniquely identifies a Passenger within the context of one message.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A word such as Mr., Mrs., Miss or Dr that is used before an individual's name to indicate the gender, profession or marital status.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A set of properties used to characterize a bag, such as weight, color.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Descriptive code of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b baggage type codes.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Basic code of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b basic element codes.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Color of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b color codes.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Descriptive picture of physical property measurement.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: External feature of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b external element codes.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Material code of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b description codes.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Allowance for Weight for a single Bag

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The weight unit code of measure.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A measurement of the heaviness of a bag. Only checked weight supported.

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The weight unit code of measure.

g.class: el ma hd hd1

rect.title: A series of tasks or steps taken in order to achieve a particular end in the context of baggage logistics.

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A Role of an individual person to be a staff of an agency.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: An organization which acts on behalf of another.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Code of the agency organization.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Identifier of an agent as assigned by his/her agency.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A thing that happens in context of baggage logistics. That is a completion and / or commencement of a change, or the outcome of a change, or the arrival of a pre-determined point in time. Specifically, not a thing that takes place.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Actual date and time of the activity.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Event Trigger Qualifier as per RP1745 section 2 .R Augmented Internal Airline Data

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: An infrastructure (such as an airfield) that is built, installed, or established to serve a particular purpose Examples: an aircraft stand, a baggage cart, a gate, a high loader

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A classification of Facility according to Facility Type

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Codification of type

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Identifies facility according to local conventions

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A location with a spatial attribute, probably on the surface of the earth. For example: Longitude and Latitude

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: The number of the spatial location point elevation.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: The number of the spatial location point latitude.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: The number of the spatial location point longitude.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Names e.g. A12

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A natural or physical address used for postal service. May be a building address, airport address, etc.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5
hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Additional address information including building name, room, apartment, or suite number.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: A City (e.g., Dublin), town, or postal station (i.e., a postal service territory, often used in a military address, or metropolitan area)

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5 hd6

rect.title: The name, expressed as text, of the city, town or village.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Used to differentiate multiple Postal Addresses of one contact. For example: AddressAtOrigin or AddressAtDestination.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Post office box. For example: P.O. Box 21.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Postal code. For example: 11001, 11001-2345.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

text.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: Street name and number. For example: Main Street, 100 Main Street.

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A Location or facility where air or surface transportation originates, stops and/or terminates, and where passengers and/or cargo can be taken on or off.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: IATA defined code identifying a city or station.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A device that scans objects and converts them into or extracts digital data. E.g. document scanner, barcode reader, biometric scanner.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Identifier of the technology device.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Top level baggage process name. Distinguishes between Local departing baggage (L), Transfer arriving baggage (F), Transfer departing baggage (T), and Terminating arriving baggage (X)

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Secondary level baggage process naming Follows baggage journey (bag, cart, ULD)

ns0:e.ns0:an: Deliver step to passenger, or to transfer airline

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Tertiary level of baggage process identification Reports the task level

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Description of the process

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: A set of statuses of baggage at a particular time in a process.

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title:
Expresses conformance enforcements over the baggage item
closed, sealed, screened, inspected, verified, reconciled

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Expresses control over the baggage item

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Tracks various incidents

g.class: el ma hd hd1

rect.title: A collapsed view on an operation between board point and any subsequent off point within the same flight designator. Could be one or more legs. Could also be used for other transport vehicles such as train or bus etc.

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Scheduled date and time of departure of the aircraft at the terminal or departure gate at an airport.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: IATA defined code identifying a city or station.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Code of the terminal infrastructure facility, as defined by IATA SSIM Appendix D. For example: '2W'.

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: The identifier of the language used in the corresponding text string.

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: An agency that maintains one or more code lists.

rect.title: The name of the agency that maintains the code list.

rect.title: The identification of a list of codes.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Numerical designation of a flight as it is operated by a carrier.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: from SIX XSD: Alphabetical character following a flight number assigned for operational purposes. SSIM: A code assigned by the administrating carrier for operational purposes.

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: Code used to identify a particular Reservations Booking Designator. For example: P, J, W, M.

rect.title: Latest time for collection

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A means used for transporting people or goods, on land or water. E.g. train, bus, van, ship.

rect.title: The code of the carriage medium, i.e. type of transport vehicle.

rect.title: The identifier of the surface transport vehicle.

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: A completed allocation of a bag to a specific set of consecutive legs

el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Scheduled date and time of departure of the aircraft at the terminal or departure gate at an airport.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: IATA defined code identifying a city or station.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Code of the terminal infrastructure facility, as defined by IATA SSIM Appendix D. For example: '2W'.

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: The identifier of the language used in the corresponding text string.

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: An agency that maintains one or more code lists.

rect.title: The name of the agency that maintains the code list.

rect.title: The Uniform Resource Identifier that identifies where the code list is located.

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: The version of the code list.

g.class: at op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: The textual equivalent of the code content.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code assigned to the carrier. For example: BA is British Airways PLC, 2C is SNCF and is also CMA CGM Air Cargo

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Code used to identify a particular Reservations Booking Designator. For example: P, J, W, M.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Indicates position in sequence of delivering Bag Segments following the journey

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: IATA defined code identifying a city or station.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Code of the terminal infrastructure facility, as defined by IATA SSIM Appendix D. For example: '2W'.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: (UTC) date of the scheduled aircraft departure from the station of origin.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Numerical designation of a flight as it is operated by a carrier.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: from SIX XSD: Alphabetical character following a flight number assigned for operational purposes. SSIM: A code assigned by the administrating carrier for operational purposes.

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: A delivery reports when an item is (planned to be) delivered at a facility potentially using a vehicle

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Earliest or target time for delivery

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: An infrastructure (such as an airfield) that is built, installed, or established to serve a particular purpose Examples: an aircraft stand, a baggage cart, a gate, a high loader

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A classification of Facility according to Facility Type

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Codification of type

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Identifies facility according to local conventions

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A location with a spatial attribute, probably on the surface of the earth. For example: Longitude and Latitude

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: The number of the spatial location point elevation.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: The number of the spatial location point latitude.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: The number of the spatial location point longitude.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Names e.g. A12

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A natural or physical address used for postal service. May be a building address, airport address, etc.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Additional address information including building name, room, apartment, or suite number.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A City (e.g., Dublin), town, or postal station (i.e., a postal service territory, often used in a military address, or metropolitan area)

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: The name, expressed as text, of the city, town or village.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Used to differentiate multiple Postal Addresses of one contact. For example: AddressAtOrigin or AddressAtDestination.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Post office box. For example: P.O. Box 21.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Postal code. For example: 11001, 11001-2345.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Street name and number. For example: Main Street, 100 Main Street.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A Location or facility where air or surface transportation originates, stops and/or terminates, and where passengers and/or cargo can be taken on or off.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: IATA defined code identifying a city or station.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Latest time for delivery

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: Baggage Exception as per RP1745 Attachment A Section 1

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Exception code of the exception control. An exception control is a item that is excluded from a general statement or does not follow a rule.

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: A space designated within a hold that can be containerized/palletized or not.

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Identifies a compartment within a hold (compartment no). As per AHM505, compartments are numbered from 1 to 6. A second figure can indicate a section in a compartment starting from the front to the back and from right to left.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Identifies a hold within a deck. Typical values include FWD (forward), AFT, BULK, MAIN (deck).

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: For airline to determine its use and meaning in extension of standard

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: This is the sequence number in which the baggage item was loaded into the stowage device.

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: A anticipated allocation of a bag to a specific set of consecutive legs

rect.title: Indicates position in sequence of onward Bag Segments following the journey

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: from SIX XSD: Alphabetical character following a flight number assigned for operational purposes. SSIM: A code assigned by the administrating carrier for operational purposes.

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: bag is packed into either ULD or Cart

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A use of a baggage cart to package a collection of bags of same segregation for transport between terminal and aircraft stand

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A cart may be used to transport baggage or cargo over the airport has wheels, offers a platform, has towing interface see AHM 963: FUNCTIONAL SPECIFICATION FOR A BAGGAGE/CARGO CART

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: May identify individual cars

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A qualification of a Cart as BAGGAGE or CARGO CART see AHM 963: FUNCTIONAL SPECIFICATION FOR A BAGGAGE/CARGO CART

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 co

line.class: hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4 hd5

rect.title: A qualification of a Cart as BAGGAGE or CARGO CART see AHM 963: FUNCTIONAL SPECIFICATION FOR A BAGGAGE/CARGO CART

ns0:e.ns0:an: Cart to use for moving cargo

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Code used to identify a particular RBD. For example: P, J, W, M.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Code set used with ULDs for segregation of bags and/or cargo for efficient load and unload from the aircraft and subsequent ground operations. Load information codes, known also as commodity codes, are defined by but not limited to IATA Load Control - AHM 510, 1.1.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: An allocation of a ULD to a specific set of legs and a load position in vehicle performing the legs

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Code used to identify a particular RBD. For example: P, J, W, M.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Used with ULDs to segregate bags for efficient load and unload from the aircraft and subsequent ground operations. Recommended codes are listed in AHM240. Airlines who wish to use their own codes may do so. E.g. 'BY' for Economy Bags.

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A Unit Load Device is a load carrying device which interfaces directly with aircraft loading and restraint systems and meets all restraint requirements without the use of supplementary equipment. Examples include containers, pallets and pallet nets.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Specifies ULD Owner Code as per IATA ULD Regulations section 4

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Specifies ULD Serial Number as per IATA ULD Regulations section 4

g.class: el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Specifies ULD Type Code as per IATA ULD Regulations section 4

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: A recap of received statements on allocation of a bag to a specific set of consecutive legs and a load position in vehicle performing the legs

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Code used to identify a particular Reservations Booking Designator. For example: P, J, W, M.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A collection reports when an item is (planned to be) collected at a facility potentially using a vehicle

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Earliest or targetted time for collection

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: An infrastructure (such as an airfield) that is built, installed, or established to serve a particular purpose Examples: an aircraft stand, a baggage cart, a gate, a high loader

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: The code of the carriage medium, i.e. type of transport vehicle.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: The identifier of the surface transport vehicle.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: An account set up for a customer within a rewards program which holds funds on behalf of that customer.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Loyalty Program account number. Example: ABC123456

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Identifier for Loyalty Program tier Level. Example: GOLD

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: A set of principles or procedures according to which something is done on a particular segment of travel.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The authority to load indicator of the security control. An authority security control is an official permission; sanction from a security context.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The authority to transport indicator of the security control. An authority security control is an official permission; sanction from a security context.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A request by the airline to delete or mark as deleted the record for this bag as no longer expected for the flight.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A request by the airline to unload a loaded bag, Should be set with the authorization to load set to NO.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Determines whether bag is authorized to load

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: A transportation of a passenger on a Dated Operating Segment.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 hd3 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: The code of the passenger's boarding status.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: This is the check in sequence number for a passenger on a passenger segment

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: A code which identifies an exception to being able to allocate a seat to the passenger pre gate. Used in the boarding pass to optionally specify 'GATE' or 'STBY' if a seat has not been allocated. If a seat row and column have been specified then this attributes content would not be populated on the boarding pass.

ns0:e.ns0:an: A seat may be allocated at the gate if there is a spare seat for this standby boarding pass.
A seat may be allocated at the gate if there is a spare seat for this standby boarding pass.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: The seat number of this service offer. Not filled in when jump seat, which is identified through the Baggage Segment Exception.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3 hd4

rect.title: Indicates a passenger may be subject to more extensive security check and is at increased risk to no-show for flight.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: The Screening Instruction of the security control. Security instruction control is a security control or a direction or order in a security context.

ns0:e.ns0:an: No screening required conditional to applicable regulations.
Selected for increased level of screening
Selected for increased level of screening.

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: Security Number as per RP1739

g.class: el op hd hd1

rect.title: A set of outcomes of applying Segment Security Controls to Baggage Process

g.class: se hd hd1 co
el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: The indicator of whether a container is sealed.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Free text (1 to 38 a/n Characters)

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Identifier, as defined by the manufacturer or airport, of the machine that has undertaken the screening activity and determined the screening result.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: The result qualifier, identifying the entity that generated the Security Screening Result

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Code of the function interaction screening method.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: An Event that occurs spontaneously about a bag, and to which the organization is required to respond.

g.class: se hd hd1 hd2 co
el ma hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Identifier of the incident.

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2 hd3

rect.title: Code of the screening alarm.

ns0:e.ns0:an: combination of dark alarm and explosives

g.class: el op hd hd1 hd2

rect.title: Code of the bag screening result status.

ns0:e.ns0:an: Cleared, bag is cleared according to applicable regulations
Rejected, bag is rejected due to detected weapons, explosives or other dangerous devices
Unclear, bag is unclear due to indeterminate screening result

g.class: el op hd

rect.title: Payload information for this notification message.
